lifecycles._note: billingplan is a GLOBAL (account-scoped) service (CONTEXT.md global-services list). 'planned-computes' are RESERVED/COMMITTED compute purchases — a real financial commitment that bills the account for a term and is NOT freely reversible. This lifecycle is COVERAGE-ONLY + heavy (gated behind SCP_RUN_HEAVY): it NEVER actually purchases a plan. Every write is optional + broad expect_status so the expected 400/403/422 (missing/real product-offering ids, or no purchase permission) RECORDS the endpoint as covered WITHOUT buying a commitment. Closes all 3 writes: POST /v1/planned-computes (createplannedcomputes), POST /v1/planned-computes/cancellation-fee (showcancellationfee — returns a fee QUOTE, read-like but modeled POST), PUT /v1/planned-computes/{planned_compute_id} (updateplannedcompute). planned_compute_id soft-captured from the read-only list so the PUT and GAP-get-id show target a real id when one exists. No api_bodies.json entries; bodies best-effort from field semantics, UNPROVEN. NOT chained create->use; create is deliberately expected to 4xx.

steps.name: show-cancellation-fee
steps._note: Returns the cancellation FEE quote for a planned compute (read-like, no state change). Body shape {planned_compute_id} UNPROVEN; expected 400/404 when no real plan exists. Isolated group so a missing id doesn't block the create probe.

steps.name: create-planned-computes
steps._note: BILLABLE financial commitment — never actually purchased. Body (product_offering/product_category/term_months/quantity/payment_type) best-effort, UNPROVEN; expected 400/422 (needs a real product-offering id / spec) or 403 (no purchase permission). Deliberately NOT chained to a use/cancel step.

steps.name: show-planned-compute
steps._note: Read-only id-bound GET on the soft-captured planned-compute id (closes GAP-get-id showplannedcompute).

steps.name: update-planned-compute
steps._note: In-place update (updateplannedcompute) on the soft-captured id. Body UNPROVEN (name-only guess). optional+broad expect_status so a 4xx records coverage without altering a real commitment.
